sections.paragraph:
Original: נשׁק

Transliteration: nâshaq

Phonetic: naw-shak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to put together, kiss
    1. (Qal) to kiss
    2. (Piel) to kiss
    3. (Hiphil) to touch gently
  2. to handle, be equipped with
    1. (Qal) to be equipped

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H5400, through the idea of fastening up

TWOT entry: 1435,1436

Part(s) of speech: Verb
